title: clinopodium sachalinense
intro: Clinopodium sachalinense, also known as Sakhalin clinopodium, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium sachalinense include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. It can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk remedies, particularly in Eastern Asia and Russia.
